title: pelargonium × hesperideum
intro: Pelargonium × hesperideum, commonly known as Cape Rose or Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the pelargonium genus. This plant is prized for its fragrant flowers and leaves, which are used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × hesperideum include relieving stress and anxiety, promoting digestion, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The leaves and flowers of this plant can be prepared as herbal teas, essential oils, or capsules, making it a versatile option for those seeking natural health solutions.
